series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of applications and certificates for Self-Insurance in accordance with sections 4509.72, 4509.59, and 4509.62 of the Revised Code. BMV 3148 – Application For Self-Insurance General BMV 3149 – Application For Self-Insurance Religious Organization BMV 3140 – Certificate of Self-Insurance BMV 3146 - Application for Certificate Deposit of $30,000 in Money or Government Bonds BMV 2182 - Certificate of Financial Responsibility, R.C. 4509.62 BMV 2180 - Application – Certificate of Financial Responsibility BMV 2181 - Certificate of Financial Responsibility, R.C. 4509.59

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in BMV Compliance Unit office files current registration period (five years), one year following date of expiration
